rationale: Keep: the two papers have strong conceptual overlap in online review evaluation, especially review valence/helpfulness dynamics and cue-based attribution processes (citing paper tests mobile cue effects and finds effects for positive but not negative reviews; cited paper explains how temporal cues mitigate negativity bias in review value). The cited study is a plausible theory/comparison foundation rather than an incidental mention, and the DOI-matched reference confirms it is explicitly included.
